creator: happy@xboxnews.de
text:
I have Samsung Q30 plus, Freeze on detect VGA on boot with ACPI but
without going without right VGAcard intel 900

The bios is uptodate
http://notebook.samsung.de/article.asp?artid=B5EBC2DD-17F8-43A6-8D6D-B4222464CA1D&show=specs
